form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months ran last of 8 at Newcastle Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 900m, slow going 7 len behind Twoexcel carrying 59kg at $81. Previously second-up 9th of 11 at Grafton Mdn-Sw on October 28 over 1015m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Monaco Flyer with 59kg at $14. Prefer to see him find some form before recommending.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second run back. First-up after five months ran last of 8 at Newcastle Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 900m, slow going 7 len behind Twoexcel carrying 59kg at $81. Previously second-up 9th of 11 at Grafton Mdn-Sw on October 28 over 1015m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Monaco Flyer with 59kg at $14. Prefer to see him find some form before recommending.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Raced wide, with cover, in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 32-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Cowra Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Nafanua carrying 59kg at $13. Before that sat on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 9 at Gilgandra Mdn-Sw on February 7 over 1280m, 5.5 len behind Proclivity carrying 57.5kg at $8.50. Strong chance to break though after the improved run last start.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Comes here off a 32-day let-up. Before that sat on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 9 at Gilgandra Mdn-Sw on February 7 over 1280m, 5.5 len behind Proclivity carrying 57.5kg at $8.50. Strong chance to break though after the improved run last start.

form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 9 at Warren Mdn on March 21 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Still Excited with 57.5kg at $51. Before that ran last of 8 at Dubbo Mdn on March 6 over 1100m, 10 len behind Claudio with 57kg at $101. Better effort last start but looks safely held.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). At the latest run 4th of 9 at Warren Mdn on March 21 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Still Excited with 57.5kg at $51. Before that ran last of 8 at Dubbo Mdn on March 6 over 1100m, 10 len behind Claudio with 57kg at $101. Better effort last start but looks safely held.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 900m, had to be eased from the heels of Still Excited.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: At the latest run 11th of 14 at Dubbo Super 3yo+ Mdnsw on March 15 over 1100m, 8 len behind Sir Herridah with 59kg at $31. The race before that 2nd of 8 at Dubbo Mdn on March 6 over 1100m, 0.7 len behind Claudio carrying 55kg at $8.50. One for the exotics.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). At the latest run 11th of 14 at Dubbo Super 3yo+ Mdnsw on March 15 over 1100m, 8 len behind Sir Herridah with 59kg at $31. The race before that 2nd of 8 at Dubbo Mdn on March 6 over 1100m, 0.7 len behind Claudio carrying 55kg at $8.50. One for the exotics.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
Began awkwardly. Obliged to course very wide rounding the home turn.
Began awkwardly. Raced wide and without cover in the early stages.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of ten weeks. Finished off last campaign eighth of 14 at Scone Ctry Mdn-Sw January 29 over 1100m, 7 len behind On One carrying 57kg at $41. Previously first up; fifth of 8 at Tamworth Mdn December 22 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Oakfield Utah with 56kg at $16. Deserves another chance from the inside gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Resuming after a spell of ten weeks. Finished off last campaign eighth of 14 at Scone Ctry Mdn-Sw January 29 over 1100m, 7 len behind On One carrying 57kg at $41. Previously first up; fifth of 8 at Tamworth Mdn December 22 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Oakfield Utah with 56kg at $16. Deserves another chance from the inside gate.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, then shifted in behind runners from its barrier.
Shifted in on jumping and bumped with The Contractor.
Near the 600m had to be checked when crowded inside Hot Fantasy.
Bumped shortly after the start by Not My Problem.
Laid out under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Grunt - Hachi Oki) has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Was third in a Beaumont (Newcastle) trial over 1000m on February 12. Has trialled okay heading into this, keep safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding (Grunt - Hachi Oki) has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Was third in a Beaumont (Newcastle) trial over 1000m on February 12. Has trialled okay heading into this, keep safe.

form.formComment: At debut, ran last in a small field at Hawkesbury Mdn on February 19 over 1000m, 8 len behind Infant Warrior carrying 59kg at $6.50. Improver in this easier race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). At debut, ran last in a small field at Hawkesbury Mdn on February 19 over 1000m, 8 len behind Infant Warrior carrying 59kg at $6.50. Improver in this easier race.

form.formComment: On debut. Three-year-old gelding by D'argento out of Astrogirl. At the most recent trial finished seventh on March 29 at Wagga over 1000m. Prefer to see how he handles race day.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). On debut. Three-year-old gelding by D'argento out of Astrogirl. At the most recent trial finished seventh on March 29 at Wagga over 1000m. Prefer to see how he handles race day.

form.formComment: Was at very long odds at debut, 11th of 13 at Muswellbrook Super Mdn on March 27 over 1280m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Overzone carrying 58.5kg at $91. Later on.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Was at very long odds at debut, 11th of 13 at Muswellbrook Super Mdn on March 27 over 1280m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Overzone carrying 58.5kg at $91. Later on.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping bumped Bubbles Please. Then raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, ran last of 8 at Moree Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 950m, 7 len behind Artie Vainqueur carrying 56kg at $41. Others look stronger prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Was at big odds at debut, ran last of 8 at Moree Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 950m, 7 len behind Artie Vainqueur carrying 56kg at $41. Others look stronger prospects.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second of 11 at Dubbo Ctry Mdn October 3 over 1000m, a head behind Silver Chair with 57.5kg at $2. First up last campaign second of 11 at this track Mdn September 1 over 900m, soft track; 0.5 len behind Denman Bandit carrying 56kg at $5.50. Talented gelding who can sprint well fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Gelding back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second of 11 at Dubbo Ctry Mdn October 3 over 1000m, a head behind Silver Chair with 57.5kg at $2. First up last campaign second of 11 at this track Mdn September 1 over 900m, soft track; 0.5 len behind Denman Bandit carrying 56kg at $5.50. Talented gelding who can sprint well fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced very wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, sat on the pace before fading 7th of 9 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Wazing carrying 59kg at $3.50. Second-up eased back early on 6th of 11 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1100m, 3 len behind Prince Pienza carrying 59kg at $12. First run for the new yard and stays in the mix.
